chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D- 1023 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with Signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 22.10.2025 M/s Manzoor Hussain N.Larik and Waqar Ali Phulpoto, Advocates for the Petitioner Agha Ather Hussain Pathan, Assistant AG Sindh >>>>>..<<<<< After arguing the matter at some length, learned counsel for the Petitioner does not press instant Constitutional Petition and submits that at the first instance, the Petitioner for redressal of his grievance will approach along with a written complaint to Provincial Assistant Registrar, Joint Stock Companies, Sukkur Region Sukkur, which is not opposed by learned Assistant AG. Order accordingly. Judge Judge ARBROHI
